# Transcrição: 01. Your First Challenge

- **Fonte:** 01. Your First Challenge
- **Duração:** 00:45
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:45]

Okay, so the first challenge that I'm going to set out for you guys is to get yourself published and to set up your online portfolio. Remember, getting published doesn't have to be that hard. Start with a video, record something that you're really competent at, and get someone on Fiverr or a journalist to transcribe it into a blog or an article for you that you can then submit. In your portfolio, you have access to a template for WordPress and you also have access for a template on ClickFunnels, so make sure that you customize something for yourself in there. Once you have these two things, once you get published and once you have your portfolio, share them inside of the group and tag us in and we've got a little surprise for you.
